experience.title: Teacher
bullets: advocate for students with visual impairments

skills_and_achievements: IDEA compliance; IEP leadership; RTI/MSDI; school-wide PBIS; instructional coaching; data analysis & progress monitoring; staffing/interviewing; scheduling/budgeting; PD facilitation; behavior intervention (MDR); collaboration with state agencies; TVI track (vision rehabilitation, low-vision services); documented 95–100% state test pass rates over a decade; consistently ‘Highly Effective’ on Compass.
